brand.name: Pindrop
brand.description: Plan unforgettable trips with intelligent itineraries, real-time weather insights, and personalized recommendations.

login.title: Welcome back
login.subtitle: Sign in to continue planning your adventures

register.title: Create your account
register.subtitle: Join Pindrop and start planning smarter adventures

forgotPassword.title: Forgot password?
forgotPassword.subtitle: Enter your email and we'll send you a reset link if an account exists.

resetPassword.title: Reset your password
resetPassword.subtitle: Choose a strong new password for your account

oauth.failed: Google sign-in failed. No token was returned.

hero.title: Where to next?
hero.subtitle: Let our AI craft the perfect itinerary tailored to your preferences and travel style.

empty.title: No trips yet
empty.subtitle: Your adventures will appear here. Start by letting our AI plan your first trip in just a few taps.

empty.title: No favorites yet
empty.subtitle: Discover itineraries shared by fellow travelers and save the ones you love. They'll show up here for quick access.

globe.title: Interactive Globe Coming Soon
globe.subtitle: Explore your trips visually on an interactive 3D globe. See all your destinations and plan routes with ease.
globe.subtitleWithMarkers: You have {{count}} destinations mapped across your trips. The interactive globe is coming soon.

placeholder.comingSoon: This section is coming soon. Stay tuned for more travel planning features.

preferences.title: Set your preferences
preferences.subtitle: Tell us how you like to travel so we can personalize your trip

eco.label: Budget-conscious
eco.description: Hostels, street food, free sights, public transit

midRange.label: Balanced
midRange.description: Mid-range stays, mix of paid and free experiences

premium.label: Splurge-friendly
premium.description: Premium stays, fine dining, standout experiences

priorities.heading: Where to spend
priorities.hint: Choose Save, Balanced, or Invest for each category

transport.heading: Getting around
transport.hint: Select at least one way you prefer to travel
transport.avoidFlying: Avoid flying when train is reasonable
transport.carHint: Fuel, parking, and tolls will be included in transport estimates when you drive or rent a car.

relaxed.label: Relaxed
relaxed.detail: Slow days, long meals, beach clubs, spa, nightlife

balanced.label: Balanced
balanced.detail: Museums, scenic walks, one highlight per day, wellness

active.label: Active
active.detail: Hiking, long walks, adventure sports, outdoors

requirements.heading: Anything else we should know?
requirements.placeholder: e.g. wheelchair-accessible routes, must visit Auschwitz, no early mornings, traveling with a dog

interests.title: What sounds good in {{destination}}?
interests.subtitle: Pick 1–3 that matter most for your trip
interests.loadFailed: Could not load interest suggestions. Please go back and try again.
interests.minRequired: Select at least one interest to continue.
interests.maxReached: You can select up to 3 interests.
interests.aiNote: Our AI will use your selections to craft unique experiences in {{destination}}.

requirements.heading: Anything else we should know?
requirements.placeholder: e.g. wheelchair-accessible routes, must visit Auschwitz, no early mornings, traveling with a dog

proposals.costDisclaimer: AI-generated estimates — not verified prices. Actual costs may vary.

password.minLength: Password must be at least 8 characters.

destination.pickFromList: Select a destination from the suggestions, popular list, or map.

startDate.past: Start date cannot be in the past.

endDate.past: End date cannot be in the past.
endDate.beforeStart: End date must be on or after the start date.

preferences.transportRequired: Please select at least one transport mode.
preferences.categoryRequired: Please set a spending priority for each category.
